_meta.source: ASSESSMENT.pdf (banco propio de Speak Easy / ClearPath)
_meta.NOTA_DISCREPANCIA: El PDF original tiene 44 preguntas reales (Card 2 a Card 45), pero la tabla de rangos CEFR que compartiste asume 46 (A1:1-6, A2:7-12, B1:13-24, B2:25-35, C1:36-46). Faltan 2 preguntas para que los rangos cierren exacto. Mientras confirmas, deje C1 provisoriamente como 36-44 (9 preguntas en vez de 11) -- OJO: esto hay que confirmarlo con Diana antes de usar en produccion.
_meta.completionRule: El estudiante debe responder las 44 preguntas completas, sin regla de corte por preguntas sin responder (removida a pedido de Diana).
_meta.securityNote: Las respuestas correctas viven exclusivamente en Supabase (tabla question_bank), nunca en este archivo publico.
_meta.scoringNote: El campo "id" de cada pregunta es el id real de question_bank en Supabase (mismo patron que data/nivel1-listening.json). El navegador solo usa este id para guardar la respuesta via el Edge Function submit-response -- la correccion, el calculo del ceiling CEFR (cefrRanges abajo es solo referencia informativa) y el desbloqueo de OET/STEPS2 se calculan 100% server-side, igual que en Listening.

questions.question_text: Jane loves ______.
Do you like dogs? No, ______.
My class starts ______ 8 o'clock every morning.
Good morning! Please ______ your seat belt.
Yesterday the weather ______ very cold.
How do you ______ to the bank?
- ______ some tea? - Yes, thank you, ______ some.
options: Would you to like / I'd like

questions.question_text: This TV show is ______ the movie.
Johnny's birthday is tomorrow! ______ a cake.
It's raining! ______ a ride home?
I love this picture: it's the house ______ I was born.
The flowers in the garden are ______ every morning.
- Where do you want to have lunch? - ______ is okay with me. I just want ______ light to eat.
Just a cup of coffee please; I've ______ lunch.
You've finished that book, ______?
I like this article although I disagree with ______ the writer's points.
There was a huge snowstorm, and all the flights to New York ______, so I missed the conference.
Our trip to Mumbai was fabulous; it wasn't nearly ______ we'd expected, so we went to Goa for a few days, too.
I'd upgrade my laptop if ______ some spare money.
School was closed for the past several days ______ the heavy snow.
They're not here, ______? We should have called before we drove all the way out here.
Oh, look at these old photos! We ______ in Corfu at the time - isn't it gorgeous?
Traffic was gridlocked and by the time we got to the airport, my flight ______.
I wish the phone would stop ringing! It's ______ annoying nuisance!
- The boss said this decision is 'on a need-to-know basis'... I'm not quite sure what he meant. - Oh, right, that means we should only tell ______ about it to do their jobs.
Share prices are dropping ______ so this is the best time to purchase.
The policeman warned me that I ______ a ticket next time.
You ______ cautiously down the central staircase, and when the lobby is clear you will exit the building by the staff entrance.
______ to make a contribution to the office fund; your name seems to be the only one missing on this list.
options: I thought perhaps you will like
I think perhaps you would like

questions.question_text: How long ______ when the taxi arrived?
______ into the room, the officer shouted for everyone's attention.
Don't leave your car unlocked: ______!
I was in such a hurry that I pressed 'send' as soon as I ______ the email.
This political advertisement is ______ inaccurate.
options: not only insulting, as well as

questions.question_text: If ______, ______ to top universities right now.
options: I'd studied harder / I would be applying
I'd studied harder / I can apply
I would of studied harder / I would be applying

questions.question_text: It is ______ that the death toll from the earthquake ______ to rise.
In order to not give false hope, ______ should be realistic when trying to solve ______.
Select the statement which is correct.
options: Under no circumstances should you speak to anyone about this.
Under no circumstances are you speaking to anyone about this.
You should speak to anyone about this under no circumstances.

questions.question_text: ______ that I love you.
options: I was trying to say was
What I was trying to say
What I was trying to say is

questions.question_text: ______ the shelves all day, ______ the book was no longer in stock.
______ change seats with me; I'm feeling rather chilly by this window.
options: Would you be so kind as to

questions.question_text: He ______ the strongest candidate for this position.
______ to eat that last piece of cherry pie, I may as well eat it myself.
I'm sorry... ______
